description: Panoramic viewing point of Dalian city, offering a full view of the urban area and coastline.
Wooden boardwalk nestled between mountains and sea, providing views of the Yellow Sea and city skyline.
Golden Pebble Beach core seaside bathing area, featuring fine sand and clear waters, ideal for coastal leisure.
Dalian's historic core area, surrounded by numerous century-old European-style buildings showcasing the city's historical evolution.
Historic cultural district with well-preserved modern architectural complexes and a strong artistic atmosphere.
Seaside park renowned for its unique black reefs, featuring distinctive geological landscapes.
Modern museum showcasing Dalian's urban development and industrial civilization.
The world's first museum themed around the mysteries of life, exhibiting biological plastination specimens.
Dalian's modern business district featuring a musical fountain and seaside promenade.
